title: Inline scooter - Evo - blauw
features: Evo INLINE CHILDRENS' SCOOTER - This fun, durable Junior Inline Scooter has been specifically designed with an active child in mind. The 2-wheeled kick scooter is the perfect choice for a boy's scooter or girls scooter, available in different colourways. With an easy fold and lock mechanism, this scooter is handy for easy storage and transportation when not in use. This scooter is ideal for your kids to develop their scooting skills as they move from a toddler's scooter to a childs scooter.

FEATURES - The Childrens Inline has adjustable handle heights of 67cm- 77cm, making this suitable for any child 5+. This scooter is also made up of a strong alloy frame and anti-slip footplate, along with 2x 125mm wheels and an ABEC 5 Bearing featuring a rear braking system. The EVA handles make for a very firm grip yet are remarkably light in weight, durable and chip resistant. Simply watch as your little one jumps on has endless hours of safe and sturdy scootering fun.

EASY FOLD FOR HANDY STORAGE - With This Evo Inline Childrens Scooter, you can store it almost anywhere whether at Home, School, Camping, Caravanning or on the go. This scooter has a simple fold and lock mechanism allowing easy storage, even fitting it under a pram. Making this perfect for fun at the park, on your driveway, in your garden & on the go. Not only is this scooter easy to store it promotes outdoor play by getting kids away from screens and providing some scooter fun for all.

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS - Includes 1x Evo 2 Wheeled Inline Scooter. Adjustable Handle Height: 67cm - 77cm. Maximum Weight: 50KG. ABEC-5 Bearings. Easy Fold Mechanism. Dimensions - H67-77cm x W32cm x D67cm. Suitable for children 5+

Evo RANGE - The Evo Range from HTI is the perfect scooter range for children aged 2+. With a wide range and incredible value, there is something for everyone. Offering everything from all things scooters to themed ride ons including, Police Cars, Unicorn Cars and Fire Trucks. With our unique look and outstanding quality and child will be excited to get in the outdoors.
